breakdown: This PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) to the rewards box visibility logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui. The change is minimal and targeted, with updated docstrings explaining the new behavior. However, no specific tests were added for this new condition, which is a significant gap in test coverage for a visibility logic change.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking condition (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) to has_visible_content check in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui
Updated docstring to document the new XP progress tracking visibility rule
Renamed ensure_level_up_rewards_pending references to _check_and_set_level_up_pending in test file comments
Refactored test imports to use session_header_utils module instead of world_logic_module for session header tests
